violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the main entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the walk-in fan guards have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2026

The area under the front ice bin has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (chopper blade) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2025
The shared dumpster enclosure has an accumulation of litter and debris. Employee swept enclosure during inspection. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2025
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. English Responding to Vomiting and Diarrhea Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2025
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels due to dispenser not working at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2025

Per interview of PIC, blender bowls are only washed, rinsed, and sanitized at the end of the day. The surfaces of equipment that contacts time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as meats and cheeses must be washed, rinsed, and sanitized at least every four hours. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2025

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 100 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 150-200 ppm. Service was called during inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (chopper blade) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Chopper was taken to be cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2025

Working containers of ingredients are not labeled with the common name of the food. Energizer and fat burner pills are not labeled on the container - the label is on the rack containing multiple products. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2025
Food observed stored on the floor in the walk in freezer. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2025
Single service items observed stored on the floor in the kitchen. Single service items must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2025
The chopper was not in good repair, with teeth broken off. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonia sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the supplement tower, ice machine, prep units, utensil drawer for panini utensils, and can opener base have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. The bottom of the small prep unit has an accumulation of water. New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2025
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2025
The shared dumpster enclosure has an accumulation of litter and debris.Dumpster enclosure must be maintained clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2025

The floors throughout the facility especially beneath equipment have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2025

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored in the storage area. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2025
Inspector observed dump sink to be leaking from faucet. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2024
The caulking at the dump sink was observed to be torn. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 12/27/2023
